evidence.name: Bloody cloth fragment
evidence.description: Small piece of fabric with visible blood stain found near the broken window

evidence.name: Muddy boot print
evidence.description: Partial boot print in mud near the loading dock

evidence.name: Smudged fingerprint on safe
evidence.description: Partial fingerprint found on the warehouse safe handle

evidence.name: Broken display case glass
evidence.description: Glass shards from the broken jewelry display

evidence.name: Spray paint can
evidence.description: Abandoned spray paint can near the graffitied wall

suspects.name: Marcus Webb
suspects.description: Known associate of harbor smuggling ring, prior burglary conviction

suspects.name: Diana Cross
suspects.description: Former warehouse employee, terminated last month for misconduct

suspects.name: Ray Morales
suspects.description: Night watchman with access to all areas, recently took out a large loan

witnesses.name: Tom Brennan
witnesses.statement: I saw someone climb out the east window around midnight. They were wearing a dark jacket and moved like they knew the place. I think they cut themselves on the broken glass because I saw them grab their arm.

witnesses.name: Sara Nguyen
witnesses.statement: I was walking my dog near Pier 7 last night and noticed a guy near the loading dock. He had on work boots and a baseball cap. Looked like Marcus Webb from the neighborhood, but I can't be 100% sure in the dark.
